title: The Red Half
description: Four ingredients have the R− aspect. There are only 4 R− alchemicals in total — what does that mean for the rest?

hints.text: Your clues tell you ing1, ing2, ing3, and ing4 are all R-. How many R- alchemicals exist in the game in total?
There are exactly 4 R- alchemicals: npN, nPp, Nnp, NNN. All four are already committed to ing1, ing2, ing3, and ing4. No R- alchemical is left for ing5. What sign must ing5 have?
The four R- alchemicals (npN, nPp, Nnp, NNN) are fully used by ing1, ing2, ing3, and ing4. The remaining four alchemicals — pnP, pNn, Ppn, PPP — are all R+. So ing5 must be R+.
